summary: White-Label Partner Full Flow Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 tests pass (100%). All critical requirements verified: partner creation, org with partner_id, store creation, user auto-inherits partner_id from org, impersonate returns partner_id, login returns partner_id, sold_required_fields (including full_size_image) persist correctly. Frontend: Account Management section visible for impersonated partner org_admin with Organizations, Accounts, All Users links.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend properly auto-inherits partner_id in all user creation endpoints: /api/admin/users, /api/admin/users/create, /api/admin/users/add-team-member
Impersonation endpoint properly resolves partner_id from user record first, then falls back to org
Login endpoint properly resolves partner_id from org if not directly on user
sold_required_fields including 'full_size_image' persist correctly via PUT /api/admin/partners/{id}
Frontend more.tsx line 525 correctly determines isPartner from user.partner_id
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed partner, org, store, user during testing. Data left in DB for verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full white-label partner flow is working correctly. Key fixes verified: 1) User creation auto-inherits partner_id from org.partner_id, 2) Impersonation endpoint resolves partner_id from org if not on user record, 3) Login resolves partner_id similarly, 4) sold_required_fields persist correctly including full_size_image toggle.

backend.POST /api/admin/partners: PASS - Creates partner with sold_workflow_enabled and sold_required_fields
backend.GET /api/admin/partners/{id}: PASS - Returns saved fields including full_size_image
backend.POST /api/admin/users: PASS - User AUTO-INHERITS partner_id from org
backend.POST /api/admin/users/create: PASS - User with invite also inherits partner_id
backend.POST /api/admin/users/{id}/impersonate: PASS - Returns partner_id in user object
backend.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns partner_id for partner org_admin

frontend.Hub/More page - Account Management: PASS - Section visible for partner org_admin (when impersonated or logged in with partner_id)
frontend.Account Management items: PASS - Organizations, Accounts, All Users links present
